reference: ONE DROP OF NICOTINE EXTRACT OF TOBACCO PLACED ON THE TONGUE OF A DOG WILL KILL HIM IN A MINUTE THE HUNDREDTH PART OF A GRAIN PICKED UNDER THE SKIN OF A MAN'S ARM WILL PRODUCE NAUSEA AND FAINTING
text: one drop of nicotine extract the tobacco placed on the tongue of the dog will kill him in a minute the hundredth part of a grain pricked under the skin of a man's arm will produce nausea and fainting
